narrative: Consolidated revenue €1.2B. Master File + Local File + CbCR all filed for FY2025. Intercompany manufacturing services priced via TNMM with benchmarking study (7 comparables, Q1-Q3 range, target 3.5% operating margin — actual 3.7%). IP residing in Ireland: DEMPE functions documented + risk control confirmed. Intercompany loan from parent to subsidiary at 4.5% (credit rating BBB, market spread 100bps over LIBOR). Captive insurance has documented risk transfer + diversification of 20+ insureds. ETR by jurisdiction all > 15%; Pillar Two top-up tax: $0. PE risk assessment confirms no fixed places of business in customer jurisdictions.
